privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for solvespace_env assemble_box_parts task by verifying that the data is an authentic SolveSpace tutorial downloaded from solvespace.com (box-parts.zip) containing base.slvs and side.slvs. Confirmed the expected part file paths (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/parts/base.slvs and side.slvs) and the expected output path (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/box_assembly.slvs) match the explicit instructions and setup scripts. Discovered a major bug: the task config specifies a program evaluation using 'verifier.py::verify_assemble_box_parts', but 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the task environment, rendering the task unscorable.
